query: It's definitely going to rain all day on Day 7. Cancel any outdoor activities, I'll figure out replacements.

old_node.name: Distillery District Walk
old_node.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.
